mission.title: flowise: In Memory Vector Store not working [BUG]
mission.description: In Memory Vector Store not working [BUG]. This issue affects 5+ users.

steps.title: Identify the issue
steps.description:
Check your Flowise installation for In-Memory Vector Store errors. The issue manifests as:
```
Error: Received tool input did not match expected schema
```
This occurs when using the In-Memory Vector Store with certain agent configurations.

steps.title: Review Flowise configuration
steps.description:
Check your Flowise setup:
```bash
docker logs flowise --tail=50 2>/dev/null | grep -i error
```
The bug is related to how the In-Memory Vector Store component passes schema information to agent tools.

steps.title: Apply the fix
steps.description:
Update Flowise to a version with the fix:
```bash
# Via npm
npm update flowise -g

# Via Docker
docker pull flowiseai/flowise:latest
docker restart flowise
```
If you cannot update, try using a different vector store (e.g., Chroma) as a workaround.

steps.title: Verify the fix
steps.description:
Test the In-Memory Vector Store by:
1. Creating a new flow with an In-Memory Vector Store
2. Upserting a document (e.g., a PDF)
3. Querying through a Conversational Agent

Confirm the "tool input did not match expected schema" error no longer occurs.

resolution.summary: The In-Memory Vector Store bug was caused by incorrect schema validation in the DynamicStructuredTool. Updating Flowise resolves the issue.

prerequisites.description: Flowise installed via npm (npx flowise start) or Docker.
